content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Monetize Skills (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize your coding skills. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck to monetization isn't your coding ability; it's your delivery speed. By leveraging a high-leverage SaaS starter kit, you transform repetitive boilerplate into a repeatable machine. Combine Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding with Claude Code’s autonomous execution to ship production-ready SaaS products in days, not months, drastically increasing your project margins.
content.intro:
You’ve spent thousands of hours mastering frameworks, yet your bank account remains stagnant. Every project feels like a custom build from scratch—draining your energy and killing your profit margins. You’re trading time for dollars on repetitive tasks that should be automated, leaving you burned out and stuck in the 'freelancer trap' of manual implementation.

It’s time to stop building and start assembling. By adopting an industrial-grade SaaS starter kit, you shift from being a laborer to a systems architect. This approach allows you to deploy fully authenticated, database-ready, and payment-integrated environments in minutes, turning your technical expertise into a high-velocity, scalable income stream.

steps.title: Architect the Core Infrastructure
steps.description: Define the foundational schema and authentication flow to ensure your SaaS is secure and scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust SaaS architecture using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Include role-based access control, database schema for multi-tenant users, and a secure API structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project with the Antigravity architecture schema provided.'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Eliminate the 'empty project' syndrome by using automated scaffolding to set up your routing and component libraries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a modular UI component library using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn. Ensure all components are accessible and follow a consistent design system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npx shadcn@latest init && npx shadcn@latest add button card input'

steps.title: Integrate Payment & Billing Logic
steps.description: Implement Stripe subscriptions early to validate your monetization model before writing business-specific features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler to sync subscription status with the Supabase database. Handle successful payments, cancellations, and upgrade events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm install stripe @stripe/stripe-js && claude write src/app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts'

steps.title: Implement AI-Powered Features
steps.description: Use LLM integration to offer high-value features that justify a premium price point to your clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add an AI-assisted chat interface using Vercel AI SDK that connects to OpenAI's GPT-4o, including streaming responses and chat history persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Configure the Vercel AI SDK for the chat interface, ensuring stream-to-UI implementation.'

steps.title: Deployment & CI/CD Hardening
steps.description: Automate the deployment pipeline so you can ship updates with a single command, maintaining client trust and project momentum.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel, including build checks and environment variable validation.

pro_tips: Always build your own 'internal' starter kit as a private repo; never start from a blank folder for client work.
Use Supabase 'Row Level Security' (RLS) instead of manual middleware checks to save hours of debugging time.
Monetize your starter kit by offering 'maintenance packages' that include regular security patches and feature updates.
Use Claude Code to document your codebase automatically; well-documented code is easier to hand off and charge a premium for.
Prioritize 'feature flagging' in your starter kit so you can ship half-finished features behind a toggle to maintain constant delivery momentum.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is live, create a 'Demo' version of a common SaaS problem (like a CRM or Task Manager). Use this as your primary sales asset to show clients exactly what they are paying for.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business. With the right architecture, you can double your output while cutting your hours in half. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
